artPrompt: An ornate hero shot of a strange recursive token-coin etched with an endless ouroboros loop of clasped hands, hovering above a worn card table in a beam of amber light, its surface reflecting smaller copies of itself spiraling inward, foreshortened and gleaming toward the viewer. Cigar smoke coils around it, a small frog-shaped shadow looms in the ink-black background, eerie criminal mystique. Rendered as a bold painted graphic-novel splash — strong silhouettes, heavy directional inking and dramatic shadow shapes, fully painted (not flat cel comic).
name: the favor that favors itself
text:
this card owes you a favor. you owe this card a favor. the favor owes a favor. settle up amongst yourselves. there is no settling up.
Sacrifice the favor that favors itself: it doesn't. it can't. you try. you cannot remember why you wanted to. the marker remains open. the marker was always open. the marker is the only thing that was ever real.
gain -1 life. the Don sends his regards. the Don is also you now. you don't recall agreeing to this but the paperwork is signed in your hand.
flavorText: everybody owes everybody. especially the frog. the frog owes the most.

extras.selfAware: the marker is the only real thing
